ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual */,
  "final_weight" INTEGER /* Final weight assigned to the individual's record */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of education level */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" INTEGER /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country" INTEGER /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the individual */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "is_employed" INTEGER /* Is the individual employed */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual started their current job */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual ended their previous job */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the individual */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Does the individual have a disability */,
  "veteran_status" INTEGER /* Is the individual a veteran */,
  "immigration_status" TEXT /* Immigration status of the individual */,
  "language_spoken_at_home" TEXT /* Language spoken at home */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "is_head_of_household" INTEGER /* Is the individual the head of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES work_status ("work_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationship ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES gender ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES race ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES native_country ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupation ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range categorization */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income in a numerical format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_status" (
  "work_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work status */,
  "work_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the work status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_country" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
column_names: Final weight assigned to the individual's record
Hours worked per week by the individual
Date of birth of the individual
Date when the individual started their current job
Date when the individual ended their previous job
Does the individual have a disability
Number of children the individual has
